channel.title: strichliste — the digital tally sheet for hackerspaces & clubs
channel.description: News from strichliste — the digital tally sheet for hackerspaces & clubs

item.title: strichliste 3 is here
item.description: strichliste 3 is one single application with the look and feel long-time users know. One thing to install, one thing to update — with a lot of care for the screen by the fridge.

item.title: Release v1.6.1
item.description: We’re proud to announce the new strichliste release v1.6.1 with a lot of fixes and some new features:

item.title: Builds
item.description: This 2019 post describes the old multi-repo layout. strichliste 3 is now a single application — see strichliste 3 is here.

item.title: LDAP Importer
item.description: Strichliste just got a new, experimental command! You can now import users from an LDAP source. See the console commands documentation for more details!

item.title: Strichliste 2 released!
item.description: After a lot of concept work, strichliste 2 now has a stable API and also a well designed front-end. We’ve also changed our tech stack completely. Instead of node.js in the backend, and angular js in the front-end, we’re now using a symfony based PHP backend providing the API and also command-line tools for several tasks.

item.title: More features to come
item.description: Stay tuned for more features! We’re now working on some wanted features in the next strichliste release. These features are: money transfer, splitting bills, cancellation of the last order within a specific time range and we’re preparing the database for articles

item.title: Hello World
item.description: strichliste has its own homepage now! We’re in the process of getting the content ready, stay tuned for updates.
